message:
bench: update benchmark results after loc8 refcount fixes

- Gaussian Blur now works (was crashing due to missing dup in get_loc8)
- Added Binary to startup and memory benchmarks
- All benchmarks passing except Average (known slow test)

Results:
- Binary beats Bun on: Startup (2.2x), Fib (1.36x), Loop (1.28x),
  Tail Recursive (408x), TypedArray (8.2x), Path Trace (106x)
- Bun beats Binary on: Mandelbrot (35x), Prime Factors (9.2x),
  Gaussian Blur (1.8x), Average (25x)

files.patch:
